name: Cheese and Onion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute onions in fat until golden.
3. Add cheese, salt, pepper, and mustard; cook, stirring until the cheese is melted. Remove from heat.
4. Spread bread slices with butter.
5. In a 1.5-quart casserole dish, alternate layers of bread and cheese.
6. Pour milk over the layers.
7. Bake uncovered for 1 hour. Makes 4 servings.
